_comment: Extracted from research/case-studies/ on 2026-04-12. Each block represents one giant-metric proof block for section 5 of the landing page. Industries are rotated: event services, trades (roofing), local services (HVAC), cleaning, plumbing. Never name clients — industry label only. Source file paths included for builder verification.
_display_rule: Pick 3 of 5 for the landing page v1. Claude recommends blocks 1, 3, and 4 for maximum industry spread and metric-type diversity (revenue recovered / close-rate improvement / review growth). Keep block 2 and 5 as alternates.

proof_blocks.headline: $4,200/mo recovered from leads that used to go cold
proof_blocks.caption: Response time dropped from 4 hours to 60 seconds. Weekly admin dropped from 7 hours to under 1. Three jobs a month recovered at an average of $1,400 per booking.
proof_blocks.system_installed: Missed call text-back + automated lead follow-up + booking confirmation sequence
proof_blocks.source_note: Originally framed as wedding photography. Reframed as 'event services' to honor the rotate-industries rule. This is also the origin-story case — Sameer built this for his own business first.

proof_blocks.headline: $1,200/mo recovered from missed calls during field work
proof_blocks.caption: Solo technician getting 5+ missed calls a week while on roofs and under units. Text-back fires in 30 seconds. About half of missed callers reply. Two real leads a month are now recovered that used to go to whoever called them back first.

proof_blocks.headline: Close rate jumped from 25% to 35% on sent quotes
proof_blocks.caption: 20 quotes a month. Before, follow-up happened when the owner remembered. After, a 3-touch sequence fires automatically on day 2, 5, and 10. Two additional closes a month at $2,000 per job — $4,000 in recovered revenue.
proof_blocks.system_installed: Quote follow-up sequence (3-touch over 10 days, stops on reply)

proof_blocks.headline: From 31 Google reviews to 147 in 90 days
proof_blocks.caption: Every completed job triggers a review request 2 hours later, while the customer is still happy. 4 to 5 additional jobs a month from improved local search visibility. The window for asking is 2 hours wide — automation is the only way to hit it every time.
proof_blocks.system_installed: Review and reputation automation (post-job trigger + 3-day follow-up)
proof_blocks.roi_one_liner: $1,600 to $2,000 in monthly revenue against $200 retainer

proof_blocks.headline: No-show rate cut in half with automated reminders
proof_blocks.caption: 40 appointments a month at $300 per job. Before, 6 wasted trips a month. After, 24-hour and 1-hour reminders with a reschedule link cut no-shows in half. Three recovered jobs a month, plus saved drive time.
proof_blocks.system_installed: Appointment reminder sequence (24-hour + 1-hour triggers, self-serve reschedule)

industry_coverage_check.rule: Brand voice requires rotating at least 5 distinct industries across the page (non-photo).

metric_type_diversity_check.rule: Proof blocks should not all be the same metric type — variety increases credibility.

confidentiality_check.rule: Never name a client. Industry label only unless written approval exists.

builder_notes.display: Use the <MetricXL /> primitive from components/brand/. Render metric_xl at 7.5rem Roc Grotesk Bold. Caption at 1.125rem Gilroy Regular. Industry label as cyan-outline badge above the metric.
builder_notes.count_up_animation: Only animate numeric metric_xl values (proof-01: 4200, proof-02: 1200, proof-03 and proof-04 and proof-05 are not plain numbers). For non-numeric values (31 to 147, 15% to 7%), use a fade-up only.
